items.text: Remove pricing from Boss Online Store

items.customer: Mississippi Power and Dielectric Tank Cover Projects
items.text: Follow up on last PO for inventory order
items.raw: I'm looking forward to reaching in the inventory I order on the last PO! (I'm anxiously waiting on that order, as I'm out of many products that I hoped to "never" be out of... mainly the 28" x 51"!)

items.text: Take V5 to production as finally version
items.raw: I really want V5 to be the "finally version" to take to production. (Fingers crossed.)

items.raw: I'm looking forward to reaching in the inventory I order on the last PO! (I'm anxiously waiting on that order, as I'm out of many products that I hoped to "never" be out of... mainly the 28" x 51"!)

items.text: Modify the shipped bucket cover and ship back to customer
items.raw: Please modify the one I shipped back to you so we can try and get this dialed in. (When you ship it back to me, please be sure to not charge me for it again. I have already paid for this.)

items.customer: Mississippi Power and Dielectric Tank Cover Projects
items.text: Add hole at opposite end for tension strap support on future Dielectric Tank Cover builds
items.raw: For future builds of this or when we go to modify the other ones MS Power purchased (there were 4 in total, we have fixed 1), we need to also add a hole at the opposite end of where the "tension strap hole" is

items.text: Modify D-shape bucket cover according to MS Power spec requirements and ship back
items.raw: Please modify this bucket cover, according to MS Power's spec requirements and ship it back to me

items.text: Do not charge for the modification - already paid
items.raw: When you ship it back to me, please be sure to not charge me for it again. I have already paid for this

items.text: Call Mississippi Power to explain what is needed for project dimensions
items.raw: Those notes could help in explaining what is needed... or call me.

items.text: Add tension strap hole at opposite end for future builds of this cover and when modifying other MS Power purchased covers
items.raw: For future builds of this or when we go to modify the other ones MS Power purchased (there were 4 in total, we have fixed 1), we need to also add a hole at the opposite end of where the "tension strap hole" is.

items.text: Do not charge for shipping back modified prototypes - already paid
items.raw: When you ship it back to me, please be sure to not charge me for it again. I have already paid for this
